title: Nightly ETL job fails: 'Your account has expired'
description_md:
The nightly ETL sync runs as the `etl` service account via `su - etl`. It's been failing every night with `Your account has expired; please contact your system administrator.` Nobody changed its password. SSH in as `trainee` (passwordless `sudo`), find what's actually blocking the account, and fix it so `etl` can be used again.

You're done when `su - etl -c 'echo ok'` succeeds.
